faq.title: Read Emails & Get Paid in {country} - FAQ

items.question: How much can I earn from reading emails?
items.answer: Each paid email pays between $0.05 and $5. Most members earn $20-$50 per month, but active users can earn $100+ by reading 10-20 emails daily. Finance and gaming emails typically pay the most.

items.question: Is it really free to join?
items.answer: Yes! Cashog is 100% free to join. You never need to pay anything. Just read emails and get paid.

items.question: How do I get paid for reading emails?
items.answer: You can cash out via PayPal, bank transfer, Bitcoin, Ethereum, or gift cards (Amazon, Apple, Google Play, Robux, Steam, Xbox, PlayStation). Minimum payout is just $5.

items.question: Do I need to click on links in the emails?
items.answer: Most emails require you to click a link to verify you've read the content. This takes just a few seconds and ensures you get credited.

items.question: Will I get spam emails?
items.answer: No. We partner only with legitimate brands. You can unsubscribe from any email at any time. We recommend using a dedicated email address for paid emails.

items.question: Is Cashog available in my country?
items.answer: Cashog is available in over 50 countries including the US, Canada, UK, Australia, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, India, Philippines, and many more. Sign up for free to start receiving paid emails in {country}.
